pages.text: Dormant: grants airless survival, strips harmful effects from the wearer, inflicts Wither on hit, and has a chance to stop lethal damage from killing you outright.
Awakened: while Branded and standing in low light, nearby enemies are afflicted with what the book calls $(l)Hollow Dominion$(): Wither, Weakness, and Glowing.
Extra note: darkness also increases your outgoing damage while the Void Pearl is awakened.
